settings.title: Join The Dream Team
settings.text: We’re always on the lookout for passionate and motivated teammates who thrive in a fast-paced, creative environment. If this sounds like you, explore our open roles and discover how you can help BEDGEAR empower the world to Wake Ready®.
Integrity
Quality Craftsmanship
Teamwork
Customer Commitment
Innovation

settings.title: Hungry. Humble. Curious. Clever
settings.caption: These core values drive everything we do. They define our culture, guide our decisions, and inspire our diverse team to constantly push the boundaries of creativity and innovation. At BEDGEAR, your voice is heard, your unique insights and perspectives are valued, and we proudly celebrate the diversity of thought, experience, and identity that fuel our success.
settings.heading: Who We Are

settings.title: Health & Wellness Benefits
settings.text: Your health and wellness are top priorities at BEDGEAR. We offer several comprehensive plans through the nation’s top provider, gym membership reimbursements, organized health & wellness team activities, and more.

settings.title: Retirement Plan & Financial Education
settings.text: Planning for your future is important to us. We offer a Safe Harbor 401k program with a generous company match up to 4%, along with access to money coaches and financial advisors for all employees.

settings.title: Continuing Education Reimbursement
settings.text: We believe in lifelong learning and growth at BEDGEAR. That’s why we offer tuition reimbursement per semester for those pursuing personal or professional development courses, continuing education, or certifications.

settings.title: Volunteer Time Off & Organized Volunteer Events
settings.text: Your health and wellness are top priorities at BEDGEAR. We offer several comprehensive plans through the nation’s top provider, gym membership reimbursements, organized health & wellness team activities, and more.

settings.title: Volunteer Time Off & Organized Volunteer Events
settings.text: Giving back is part of who we are. We provide paid time off to dedicate your services to a cause or organization that aligns with your values, along with two team-building volunteer opportunities per year.

settings.title: Retirement Plan & Financial Education
settings.text: Planning for your future is important to us. We offer a Safe Harbor 401k program with a generous company match up to 4%, along with access to money coaches and financial advisors for all employees.

settings.title: Social Engagement Activities
settings.text: Work and fun aren’t mutually exclusive at BEDGEAR. From our holiday parties and birthday celebrations to our beloved “Summer Fridays” and monthly food truck events, there’s always something exciting happening.

settings.title: Sleepfuel Discounts
settings.text: Employees can take advantage of deep discounts, raffles, and frequent BEDGEAR giveaways. Additionally, you’ll gain access to exclusive discounts on hundreds of products and services from the nation’s top brands.

settings.title: Benefits and Perks
settings.heading: Interested in joining the BEDGEAR team?

settings.text: Ready to help shape the future of sleep? Explore open roles and apply today!

settings.title: Life at Bedgear
settings.caption:
When it comes to our culture, we’d rather show than tell. Here are some
videos to give you a sense of the day-to-day on every team.

settings.title: From the team
settings.description: 12 years with BEDGEAR and counting... If you're seeking not just a job, but a fulfilling career, BEDGEAR is a place to be. With a learn-and-grow mindset and a vibrant culture, your experience here will be nothing short of extraordinary.
settings.heading: Ozge Sayan
settings.text: Creative Director

settings.title: From the Team
settings.description: Joining BEDGEAR has been a journey of growth and pride. As VP of Sales and one of the first employees, I've seen our vision become reality. The collaborative spirit has been instrumental in shaping our culture of innovation.  BEDGEAR offers a dynamic environment where creativity thrives, and contributions are valued.
settings.heading: Leslie Clay
settings.text: VP- Marketing & Sales North America

settings.title: From the Team
settings.description: Working at BEDGEAR has been an invaluable experience. I love being a part of a talented and diverse team that always pushed the boundaries of innovation and creativity.
settings.heading: Stephen Lockamy
settings.text: Creative Content Specialist

settings.title: From the Team
settings.description: A true testament to a great organization is how they empower their team to succeed. I am so grateful for the past 5.5 years alongside BEDGEAR. They’ve identified my strengths and empower me to my highest potential all the while making me feel at home.
settings.heading: Nicole Felix-Coschignano
settings.text: Player Development Specialist

settings.title: People First
settings.text: Our people are our greatest asset. As a BEDGEAR employee, we invest in your personal and professional growth, and we embrace your unique perspectives, experiences, and background.

settings.title: Philanthropy
settings.text: Through the BEDGEAR Foundation and partnerships with various charitable organizations, join us in giving back to communities in need around the globe.

settings.title: Sustainability
settings.text: Learn more about our commitment to keeping our planet comfortable through eco-responsible commerce and sustainable practices. Learn more
